sentences.arabic: يَرْبِطُ الْإِنْتِرْنِتُ النَّاسَ مِنْ جَمِيعِ أَنْحَاءِ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Internet povezuje ljude iz svih dijelova svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: The internet connects people from all over the world.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَطِيعُ الدِّرَاسَةَ عَبْرَ الشَّبَكَةِ وَمُشَاهَدَةَ مَقَاطِعِ الْفِيدْيُو التَّعْلِيمِيَّةِ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Možemo studirati putem mreže i s lakoćom gledati edukativne video snimke.
sentences.translationEn: We can study online and watch educational videos easily.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ أَدَاةٌ رَائِعَةٌ لِتَعَلُّمِ لُغَاتٍ وَمَهَارَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: To je sjajan alat za učenje novih jezika i vještina.
sentences.translationEn: It is a great tool for learning new languages and skills.
